texto: You have the ability to write melodies and to put lyrics that mean something: to speak about life and what people are going through in their every day ups and downs, the good times and the bad times. Country music has always talked about life, I think; that's what I've always loved about it.
explicacao: Citação de Jimi Westbrook sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “You have the ability to write melodies and to put lyrics that mean something: to speak about life…” articula reflexao, vida, day em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como day e good.

frase_original: You have the ability to write melodies and to put lyrics that mean something: to speak about life and what people are going through in their every day ups and downs, the good times and the bad times. Country music has always talked about life, I think; that's what I've always loved about it.
